title: Memory Palace output is in Black and White

posts.cooked: Hey folks i got v.19 firmware and i powered up MP today and all my output is in Black and white. Help.

posts.name: Chad @ LZX Industries
posts.cooked: It is advisable to upgrade to V2.0.1. Could you try that? Also, how are you displaying the output of Memory Palace (CVBS, DVI, monitor, capture card)? What is your sync setup? What is your Memory Palace patch?

posts.name: B C
posts.cooked: I have this problem when using MP rca/s-video out while Vidiot is sync source. DVI is in color though. Havent checked if this is fixed for me in latest beta firmware yet. Gotta dig out and dust off my CRT
I put the newest firmware on it and its putting color out again but I haven’t a clue why it was doing it. My master sync is Cadet 1
